text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
What's goin' on? There's nobody here! But I swear
I heard someone say a festival was 'bout to start.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you're the Three Goddesses, right? How's
business been treatin' ya? Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Well, endin' up here musta been some kinda
destiny or somethin'. Guess I should pay my
respects!
